$comment: Style-gate invariant spec for /build/workflows (the AI workflow builder).
Element ids are semantic UI-Bridge ids derived from each control's label/role,
verified against the clean authed capture (run 26985959070). Only POSITIONED,
always-rendered elements are asserted on: the analyzer HARD-FAILS an assertion
whose element is missing or has no bbox, so dynamic/collapsed/dev-only ids
(devtools button, memory-usage chip, radix-generated ids, scrolled-out nav) are
contrast_meets_wcag is asserted ONLY on elements with DECLARED fg+bg colors
(button-generate-0, button-search-k); on sampled-color elements it would fail
spuriously. button-generate-0 is the Stage-A contrast fix (was 3.34:1, now
white-on-#3573bd = 4.84:1) — this assertion locks that fix in.
